name: task-list-demo
description: A demo application to show how to use the new task list component in a form wizard application

scripts.build: npm run build:sass && npm run build:js
scripts.build:sass: mkdir -p public/stylesheets; sass --quiet --load-path . --style compressed --no-source-map assets/stylesheets/app.scss public/stylesheets/application.css
scripts.postinstall: npm run clean && npm run build

author: HMPO
